CASE STUDY

CareFlow Clinic Portal

Engineering an accessible, reassuring portal with a detailed doctor search directory and integrated appointment request fields.

Industry Medical & Healthcare
Technologies HTML5, CSS3, ARIA standard
Client CareFlow Hospital Trust
Completed April 2026
Visit Live Site View Source Code

The Problem

CareFlow Clinic had a legacy site that did not comply with screen reader accessibility, resulting in legal liabilities and poor client retention. Furthermore, users could not easily search for doctor profiles or clinic schedules on mobile phones, limiting customer booking volume.

Our Solution

We engineered an fully accessible static site following WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines. We structured:

  • Full ARIA Compliance: Semantic markup, keyboard navigation tags, skip links, and tabindex order.
  • Specialist Directory: A fast client-side sorting list allowing patients to browse specialists by department or availability.
  • Medical Local Schema: Integrated Physician and MedicalOrganization JSON-LD data to capture local searches for specialists in Bangalore.

The Results

100% WCAG AA Audit Compliance
+40% Appointment Bookings Increase
Top 3 Local Clinic Search Position

WebAura builds state-of-the-art web products optimized for speed, aesthetics, and high-impact business growth.
